'''dharodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachgoer|beachgoer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachgoer|beachgoer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dharodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæredheth|dhæredheth]] || [[word:dhæredhej|dhæredhej]] || [[word:dhæredhesh|dhæredhesh]] || [[word:dhæredhe|dhæredhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dharorodhoth|dharorodhoth]] || [[word:dharorodhoj|dharorodhoj]] || [[word:dharorodhosh|dharorodhosh]] || [[word:dharorodho|dharorodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharodhoth|dharodhoth]] || [[word:dharodhoj|dharodhoj]] || [[word:dharodhosh|dharodhosh]] || [[word:dharodho|dharodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharofdhoth|dharofdhoth]] || [[word:dharofdhoj|dharofdhoj]] || [[word:dharofdhosh|dharofdhosh]] || [[word:dharofdhof|dharofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dharodhotho|dharodhotho]] || [[word:dharodhojo|dharodhojo]] || [[word:dharodhosho|dharodhosho]] || [[word:dharodhoko|dharodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dharodhoth|dharodhoth]] || [[word:dharodhoj|dharodhoj]] || [[word:dharodhosh|dharodhosh]] || [[word:dharodho|dharodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dharodhothol|dharodhothol]] || [[word:dharodhojol|dharodhojol]] || [[word:dharodhoshol|dharodhoshol]] || [[word:dharodhokol|dharodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dharodhothotho|dharodhothotho]] || [[word:dharodhojojo|dharodhojojo]] || [[word:dharodhoshosho|dharodhoshosho]] || [[word:dharodhoko|dharodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dharodhothon|dharodhothon]] || [[word:dharodhojon|dharodhojon]] || [[word:dharodhoshon|dharodhoshon]] || [[word:dharodhokon|dharodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dharodhothoro|dharodhothoro]] || [[word:dharodhojoro|dharodhojoro]] || [[word:dharodhoshoro|dharodhoshoro]] || [[word:dharodhokoro|dharodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
